notes: Small SVG motifs normalized into house-style fragments for the landing map scene. Runtime uses only local vendored assets.

sources.title: Premium raster scene placeholder pack
sources.modifications: Temporary local PNG renders used to exercise the premium hybrid raster pipeline until final vendor-prepared assets are delivered.

sources.title: Landscape Mountain
sources.modifications: Redrawn as a layered low-poly mountain symbol with simplified polygons and unified house styling.

sources.title: Bird
sources.modifications: Reduced to a minimal gull silhouette for ambient sea and coast motion cues.

sources.title: Eiffel Tower
sources.modifications: Normalized into a compact silhouette suitable for miniature monument use.

sources.title: Wave vectors
sources.modifications: Converted into a reusable contour-wave motif with consistent stroke rhythm.

sources.title: Regional lighthouse motif
sources.modifications: Composed in-house from simplified geometric shapes to match sourced monument silhouettes.

sources.title: Alpine chapel motif
sources.modifications: Composed in-house as a compact landmark silhouette for mountainous regions.

sources.title: Island palm motif
sources.modifications: Composed in-house as a minimal tropical ornament for DOM insets.

sources.title: Landing ocean backdrop
sources.modifications: Created in-house as the art-directed ocean and atmosphere backdrop for the hybrid landing map scene.

sources.title: Landing land texture
sources.modifications: Created in-house as the art-directed terrain texture clipped into mainland and DOM region silhouettes.
